allow: Bash(docker exec local-mysql mysql -u app_local -papp_local_pw madness_local -e "SHOW TABLES LIKE ''%post%''; SHOW TABLES LIKE ''%slide%''; SELECT version, description, success FROM flyway_schema_history WHERE version IN \(''6'',''7''\);")
Bash(docker exec local-mysql mysql -u app_local -papp_local_pw madness_local -e "SHOW CREATE TABLE slides\\G")
Bash(docker exec local-mysql mysql -u app_local -papp_local_pw madness_local -e ":*)
